title: Elkhorn Bicycle Rack - Slender, Stout, and Stable

og.title: Elkhorn Bikepacking Rack - | Old Man Mountain
og.description:
The Elkhorn comes in two sizes; Short and Tall.

 	The Short is designed for 27.5 and 700c wheels. Fits tires up to 27.5 x 2.8" or 700c x 50mm.
 	The Tall is designed for maximum mud clearance and bikes with 29" tires. Fits tires
